title: Implementer Handoff to Governor
description: Typed handoff payload from an implementation agent back to the orchestration governor on task completion or block. Compliance is instruction-enforced, not constrained-decoding enforced.

workPackage.description: Identifier matching the WP-XX id or workPackage name from the designer-output that spawned this work

completedBy.description: Name of the agent that produced this handoff (e.g., 'Implementation Specialist', 'Backend Implementation Specialist')

completedAt.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) when this handoff was produced

status.description: completed: all AC done; partial: subset of AC done, remainder delegated; blocked: cannot proceed without unblocked prerequisite

filesModified.description: Paths of all files created or modified during this work package

testsStatus.description: Final test run results for this work package

ran.description: Whether tests were executed before this handoff

command.description: Exact test command that was run

summary.description: Brief human-readable test result summary, e.g. '12 passed, 0 failed'

deviationsFromPlan.description: List of any deviations from the approved design plan. Empty array means no deviations.

description.description: What changed relative to the plan

reason.description: Why the plan was not followed exactly

impactAssessment.description: none: cosmetic only; minor: acceptable without revert; significant: triggers revert-and-replan

blockers.description: Populated only when status is 'blocked'. Each entry describes one blocking condition.

prerequisite.description: What must be resolved or provided to unblock

recommendedNextStep.description: Agent or action the governor should take next. Required when status is 'completed' or 'partial'.
